---
title: "GrandEnrichWrap"
author: "Nadav"
date: "2024-12-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

# Initialize

```{r}
#lapply(paste('package:',names(sessionInfo()$otherPkgs),sep=""),detach,character.only=TRUE,unload=TRUE)


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

```


## Define relevant functions
```{r}

generate_run_id <- function() {
  return(format(Sys.time(), "run_%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"))
}

create_run_directory <- function(base_dir) {
  run_id <- generate_run_id()
  run_dir <- file.path(base_dir, run_id)
  dir.create(run_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  return(list(run_id = run_id, run_dir = run_dir))
}

log_run <- function(master_log,parameters,data_dir,filterinng_description,
                    background_description,group_description,gene_group_count,
                    background_group_count ) {
  
  if (!file.exists(master_log)) {
    write.table(
      data.frame(
        RunID = character(),
        DateTime = character(),
        
        data_dir = character(),
        filterinng_description = character(),
        background_description = character(),
        group_description = character(),
        
        gene_group_count = numeric(),
        background_group_count = numeric(),
        
        GrandEnrich_dbs = character(),
        comp = character(),
        locORser = character(),
        minGenes = numeric(),
        uniq = character(),
        outdir = character(),
        
        #HPO specific
        TYPorALL = character(),
        HPO_dbVer = character(),
        systems = character(),
        bodyparts = character(),
        enrORdep = character(),
        directional =character(),
        
        #ORGANizer specific
        curationLevel = character(),
        FreqOfPheno =character(),
        onlySkel = character()),

        file = master_log, sep = ",", row.names = FALSE, col.names = TRUE
    )
  }
  
  log_entry <- data.frame(
    RunID = parameters$run_id,
    DateTime = format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
    
    data_dir = data_dir,
    filterinng_description = filterinng_description,
    background_description = background_description,
    group_description = group_description,
    
    gene_group_count = gene_group_count,
    background_group_count = background_group_count, 
    
    GrandEnrich_dbs = paste(parameters$GrandEnrich_dbs,collapse=','),
    comp = parameters$comp,
    locORser = parameters$locORser,
    minGenes = parameters$minGenes,
    uniq = parameters$uniq,
    outdir = parameters$outdir,
    
    #HPO specific
    TYPorALL = parameters$TYPorALL,
    HPO_dbVer = parameters$HPO_dbVer,
    systems = parameters$systems,
    bodyparts = parameters$bodyparts,
    enrORdep = parameters$enrORdep,
    directional =parameters$directional,
    
    #ORGANizer specific
    curationLevel = parameters$curationLevel,
    FreqOfPheno =parameters$FreqOfPheno,
    onlySkel = parameters$onlySkel
  )
  
  #write.table(log_entry, file = master_log, sep = ",", row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE, append = TRUE)
}

```
 

## Define parameters

```{r}
parameters = list()
# --- Output path (EDIT THIS) ---
# Run outputs and the master log are written under base_dir/runs/.
base_dir = "."   # <- set to where results should be written
run_dir_output = create_run_directory(paste(base_dir,'/runs',sep = ''))

parameters$GrandEnrich_dbs = c('GO_BP','KEGG','GAD_Disease')
parameters$run_id = run_dir_output$run_id
parameters$outdir = run_dir_output$run_dir

parameters$comp = "Standard with HPO filtering of skeletal"
parameters$locORser = "ser"
parameters$minGenes = 20
parameters$uniq = T

#HPO specific
parameters$TYPorALL = "ALL"
parameters$HPO_dbVer = "HPO 2024-04-26 Release"
parameters$systems = "skeleton"
parameters$bodyparts = "all"
parameters$enrORdep = "enr"
parameters$directional = F

#ORGANizer specific
parameters$curationLevel = "confident"
parameters$FreqOfPheno = "all"
parameters$DBversion = parameters$HPO_dbVer
parameters$onlySkel = T

```


## Load libraries

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library('dplyr')
library('tidyr')
library('ggplot2')
library('stringr')
```

## Source GrandEnrich
```{r}
# Vendored enrichment toolkit (a copy of GokhmanLabOrganization/Enrichment-analysis), bundled in this folder.
grandEnrichDir <- "enrichment_toolkit"

source(paste(grandEnrichDir,'/TheGrandEnrich_enrich.R',sep=''))
source(paste(grandEnrichDir,'/ORGANizer_ORGANize.R',sep=''))
source(paste(grandEnrichDir,'/HPO_enrich.R',sep=''))
source(paste(grandEnrichDir,'/ORGANizer_compare.R',sep=''))
source(paste(grandEnrichDir,'/TheGrandEnrich_compare.R',sep=''))
source(paste(grandEnrichDir,'/HPO_compare.R',sep=''))


```

## Load raw data for enrichment analysis
```{r}
if(!exists('data')){
  # Per-gene allele-specific expression (ASE) summary from the human-ape hybrids.
  # On the lab server this was:
  #   /home/labs/davidgo/Collaboration/USEFUL_DATASETS/Expression/Hybrids/summarized_data/ASE_info.tsv
  data_dir = ""   # <- set to the path of ASE_info.tsv
  data <- read.csv(data_dir,sep = '\t')
}

```


# Data processing

## Filter the data according to preferences. Add description of filtering, which will be saved later

```{r}
# --- Cell type to analyse (EDIT THIS) ---
# The ASE table holds one *_gene_ase_type column per cell type. Set ASE_CELLTYPE to
# the cell type whose ASE genes should be tested. The paper's ASE enrichment used the
# osteochondral progenitor / chondrocyte column -- confirm the correct column name here.
# Available options (column prefixes):
#   Pooled_mesenchyme, Cartilage_Organoids, Motor_neuron_.MN., X9_Chondorcytes, X21_Merkel_Cells
ASE_CELLTYPE = "X9_Chondorcytes"
ase_type_col = paste0(ASE_CELLTYPE, "_gene_ase_type")

data = data[, unique(c(1:10, grep(ASE_CELLTYPE, names(data), ignore.case = TRUE)))]
```

## Define background

```{r}

background_description = 'ASE and nonASE'

genelist <- data %>%
  filter(.data[[ase_type_col]] == "ASE") %>%
  pull(Gene)

background <- data %>%
  filter(.data[[ase_type_col]] %in% c("ASE", "nonASE")) %>%
  pull(Gene)

```

## Define group for enrichment

```{r}

group_description = 'ASE genes'


title = paste('background:', length(background), 'list:',length(genelist))


```




# Run Enrichment

```{r}
GrandEnrich_results = list()
for(db in parameters$GrandEnrich_dbs){
  GrandEnrich_results[[db]] = TheGrandEnrich_enrich(db = db,
                      genelist = genelist,
                      background = background,
                      locORser = parameters$locORser,
                      minGenes = parameters$minGenes,
                      enrORdep = parameters$enrORdep,
                      comp = parameters$comp,
                      uniq = parameters$uniq,
                      outdir = paste(parameters$outdir,'/',sep=''))
}

print('TheGrandEnrich is done!')

HPO_results = HPO_enrich(genelist = genelist,
           background = background,
           minGenes = parameters$minGenes,
           TYPorALL = parameters$TYPorALL,
           HPO_dbVer = parameters$HPO_dbVer,
           systems = parameters$systems,
           bodyparts = parameters$bodyparts,
           directional = parameters$directional,
           enrORdep = parameters$enrORdep,
           comp = parameters$comp,
           locORser = parameters$locORser,
           uniq = parameters$uniq,
           outpath = paste(parameters$outdir,'/',sep='')
           )

print('HPO enrich is done is done!')

ORGANizer_results = ORGANizer_Organize(genelist = genelist,
                   background = background,
                   outpath = paste(parameters$outdir,'/',sep=''),
                   curationLevel = parameters$curationLevel,
                   FreqOfPheno = parameters$FreqOfPheno,
                   DBversion = parameters$DBversion,
                   minGenes = parameters$minGenes,
                   onlySkel = parameters$onlySkel,
                   enrORdep = parameters$enrORdep,
                   locORser = parameters$locORser,
                   comp = parameters$comp,
                   uniq = parameters$uniq)

print('ORGANizer enrich is done is done!')

write(genelist, file = paste0(parameters$outdir,'/',parameters$run_id,'_gene_list.txt'), ncolumns = 1)
write(background, file = paste0(parameters$outdir,'/',parameters$run_id,'_background.txt'), ncolumns = 1)

write.csv(genelist,paste0(parameters$outdir,'/',parameters$run_id,'_gene_list.csv'),row.names=F,col.names = FALSE)
write.csv(background,paste0(parameters$outdir,'/',parameters$run_id,'_background.csv'),row.names=F,col.names = FALSE)

sink(paste0(parameters$outdir,'/',parameters$run_id,'_parameters.txt'))
print(parameters)    
sink()    

```

# Log

```{r}
master_log = paste(base_dir, '/enrich_master_table.csv',sep='')
log_run(master_log,
        parameters,
        data_dir,
        filterinng_description,
        background_description,
        group_description,
        gene_group_count = length(genelist),
        background_group_count = length(background))



```




# Process results


```{r}

HPO_clean = HPO_results %>%
  rename(FoldChange = Enrichment)%>%
  rename(Term = Pheno)%>%
  select(Term,FoldChange,`P-value`,FDR)

ORGANizer_clean = ORGANizer_results %>%
  rename(FoldChange = Enrichment)%>%
  rename(Term = `Body Part`)%>%
  select(Term,FoldChange,`P-value`,FDR)

# Add origin column and combine
combined_GrandEnrich_results <- bind_rows(list(
  GO_BP = GrandEnrich_results$GO_BP,
  KEGG = GrandEnrich_results$KEGG,
  GAD_Disease = GrandEnrich_results$GAD_Disease,
  HPO = HPO_clean,
  ORGANizer = ORGANizer_clean),
  .id = "database")

final_results = combined_GrandEnrich_results%>%
  select(database,Term,FoldChange,`P-value`,FDR)%>%
  mutate(Term = paste(database,Term),.keep = 'unused')%>%
  arrange(FDR)%>%
  arrange(desc(FoldChange))%>%
  filter(FDR<0.05)%>%
  distinct(Term,.keep_all = TRUE)

#write.csv(final_results,paste0(parameters$outdir,'/',parameters$run_id,'_final_results.csv'),row.names=F,col.names = FALSE)



```


```{r}

```
